items.title: Introducing GPT-Live: OpenAI's New Real-Time Conversational AI
items.summary: OpenAI has launched GPT-Live, a new product offering real-time conversational AI capabilities, signaling a significant advancement in interactive AI.

items.title: OpenAI Bets on Families as ChatGPT Integrates Deeper into Households
items.summary: OpenAI is strategically targeting families, aiming to embed ChatGPT more deeply into daily household life with new features and use cases.

items.title: Hugging Face CEO Discusses Shift Away from Renting AI Models
items.summary: The CEO of Hugging Face highlights a growing trend where companies prefer to own and customize their AI models rather than relying solely on rented services.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral hiring campaign, which will be used to expand its AI-powered customer interview platform.

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is Revolutionizing Telecommunications with AI
items.summary: Deutsche Telekom is actively integrating AI across its operations to innovate and enhance its telecommunications infrastructure and services.

items.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5B in Historic IPO, Urged to Build New US Fabs
items.summary: SK Hynix completed the largest foreign IPO in US history, raising $26.5 billion, and faces calls to establish new fabrication plants in the United States.

items.title: Helping K–12 Educators Build Practical AI Skills
items.summary: OpenAI is launching initiatives to equip K–12 educators with practical AI skills, fostering AI literacy and integration in classrooms.

items.title: NYC Educators and Industry Leaders Convene to Shape AI's Future in Classrooms
items.summary: An AI summit in New York City brought together educators and industry experts at Google's offices to discuss and define the role of AI in future education.

items.title: How to Turn Slack into an AI Teammate for Automated Pull Requests
items.summary: A developer shares a method for integrating AI into Slack to automate the creation and submission of pull requests, streamlining development workflows.

items.title: DrugGen 2: A Disease-Aware Language Model for Enhanced Drug Discovery
items.summary: DrugGen 2 introduces a new disease-aware language model designed to significantly improve the efficiency and targeting of drug discovery processes.

items.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
items.summary: New research proposes a geometric-aware pretraining method to significantly improve the quality and coherence of in-context panoramic image generation.

items.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE
items.summary: Jet-Long presents an innovative approach using dynamic bifocal RoPE to efficiently extend the context window of large language models, improving their ability to handle longer inputs.

items.title: JD Oxygen AI Item Center V1: An Industrial-Scale LLM/VLM Solution for Item Understanding
items.summary: JD.com introduces Oxygen AIIC V1, an industrial-scale solution leveraging LLM/VLM for comprehensive item understanding, management, and diverse applications.

items.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: This paper introduces a novel single-rollout asynchronous optimization technique to enhance the training efficiency and performance of agentic reinforcement learning systems.

items.title: See How AI Instructions Decay and Learn to Write Persistent Ones
items.summary: An article explores the phenomenon of AI instruction decay and provides strategies for crafting more robust and enduring prompts for AI models.
